The following events took place in '''154 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Tarasin Revolt]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] ends with the [[Cularin Compact]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that the Tarasin Revolt ended 122 years before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore be deduced that the rediscovery took place in 154 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{Imo}}
